---
title: "ESMV UE4 Aufgabe"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-23"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

#Laden der Bibliotheken
library(rstudioapi)
library(tidyverse)

Sys.unsetenv("VIRTUAL_ENV")
library(reticulate)
py_require("MIDIUtil")
py_require("mido")
py_require("pandas")
py_require("music21")
py_require("partitura")
py_require("setuptools")
py_require("typing-extensions")

setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))  
```


```{python}
#Importieren aller Module
from music21 import *
import os
#Konfigurieren von music21
#[1] - No - No - Yes
configure.run()





### Aufgabe zu Übung 4 ###





# MuseScore path (wegen Windows)
us = environment.UserSettings()
us['musicxmlPath'] = r'C:\Program Files\MuseScore 4\bin\MuseScore4.exe'
us['musescoreDirectPNGPath'] = r'C:\Program Files\MuseScore 4\bin\MuseScore4.exe'


# 1A. Score and Part erstellen
score = stream.Score()

# 1B. title + composer
score.metadata = metadata.Metadata()
score.metadata.title = "U4 Melodie"
score.metadata.composer = "Arash Saatchi"

# 1C. Score and Part erstellen
part = stream.Part()


# 2. Notenschlüssel, Tonart, Taktart
part.append(clef.TrebleClef())
part.append(key.KeySignature(0)) #C-Dur
part.append(meter.TimeSignature('4/4')) #4/4-Takt


# 3. Vier Takte einer Melodie
m1 = stream.Measure(number=1)
m1.insert(0, dynamics.Dynamic('ff'))

m1.append(note.Note("C4", quarterLength=1))
m1.append(note.Note("D4", quarterLength=1))
m1.append(note.Note("E4", quarterLength=1))
m1.append(note.Note("C4", quarterLength=1))

m2 = stream.Measure(number=2)
m2.insert(0, dynamics.Dynamic('p'))

m2.append(note.Note("E4", quarterLength=1))
m2.append(note.Note("F4", quarterLength=1))
m2.append(note.Note("G4", quarterLength=2))


m3 = stream.Measure(number=3)
m3.insert(0, dynamics.Dynamic('f'))

m3.append(note.Note("G4", quarterLength=0.5))
m3.append(note.Note("A4", quarterLength=0.5))
m3.append(note.Note("G4", quarterLength=0.5))
m3.append(note.Note("F4", quarterLength=0.5))
m3.append(note.Note("E4", quarterLength=1))
m3.append(note.Note("C4", quarterLength=1))

m4 = stream.Measure(number=4)
m4.insert(0, dynamics.Dynamic('pp'))

m4.append(note.Note("D4", quarterLength=1))
m4.append(note.Note("G3", quarterLength=1))
m4.append(note.Note("C4", quarterLength=2))


# 4A. Takte zum Part hinzufügen
part.append(m1)
part.append(m2)
part.append(m3)
part.append(m4)


# 4B. final double barline
m4.rightBarline = bar.Barline('double')


# 5. Part zum Score hinzufügen
score.append(part)


# 6. Fester Speicherort auf dem Desktop
desktop_path = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser("~"), "Desktop")
file_name = "Aufgabe4-Saatchi.musicxml"
file_path = os.path.join(desktop_path, file_name)


# 7. (!!! Neue gefunden) Nur einmal speichern, danach immer dieselbe Datei öffnen
if not os.path.exists(file_path):
    score.write('musicxml', fp=file_path)
    print("Datei wurde zum ersten Mal gespeichert:")
else:
    print("Datei existiert bereits:")
print(file_path)


# 8. Datei öffnen
os.startfile(file_path)



# THE END

```

































```
